name: Apple Cheddar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the egg and vanilla.
3. Add the combined dry ingredients, blending well.
4. Stir in the cheese, apples, and nuts.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F for 15 minutes.
7. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a wire rack or plate.
